draft:
Subject: Re: Next Steps: Kickoff meeting setup for CareHealth Onboarding

Dear Chalamchala,

Congratulations on the successful execution of the Master Services Agreement with CareHealth! We are excited to kick off the technical integration process. 

To coordinate the kickoff meeting, I will provide you with the developer onboarding documentation shortly. Additionally, I will outline the technical resources required for your infrastructure team to provision before the kickoff call. 

Thank you for your proactive approach, and we look forward to a productive collaboration with CareHealth.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Hermes Success Team
original_subject: Next Steps: Kickoff meeting setup for CareHealth Onboarding
original_body:
Hello Hermes Success Team,
I am thrilled to report that our board has fully executed the Master Services Agreement this morning! CareHealth is officially a Hermes AI enterprise partner.
We want to hit the ground running. What are our immediate next steps to coordinate the technical integration kickoff?
Specifically, could you share the developer onboarding documentation and let us know what technical resources (e.g. system access, cloud permissions) our infrastructure team needs to provision prior to our kickoff call?
Looking forward to a great collaboration!
Best,
Nathan Ross
VP of Engineering, CareHealth
